step_rationale: Short-chain-fatty-acid and ketone receptor; systemic cardiac-function and inflammation regulation via GPR signaling.
mechanism: GPR43 signaling by short-chain fatty acids and ketone bodies regulates cardiac function and systemic inflammation independent of atherothrombosis.

references.title: The role of ketone bodies in oxidized LDL-induced cell proliferation and lipid accumulation of macrophages.
Microbial Peer Pressure: The Role of the Gut Microbiota in Hypertension and Its Complications.
